context: Agent must add a scoped override to biome.json for a legacy directory without touching root-level rule configuration, following the anti-pattern guidance in the nx-biome-integration skill.

checklist.name: Root formatter config unchanged
checklist.description: Root-level formatter settings (enabled, indentStyle, indentWidth) remain exactly as in the starting file.

checklist.name: Root linter config unchanged
checklist.description: Root-level linter.enabled and linter.rules.recommended remain as in the starting file. No rules are disabled at root level.

checklist.name: overrides array present
checklist.description: The output biome.json contains an overrides array with at least one entry.

checklist.name: Override includes correct path pattern
checklist.description: The override entry's includes field targets apps/legacy-portal (e.g. "apps/legacy-portal/**").

checklist.name: Override disables noNonNullAssertion only within the scoped override
checklist.description: The override entry sets linter.rules.style.noNonNullAssertion to "off". This rule is NOT set at the root linter.rules level.
